calendar.matters:
For Preliminary Injunction And Conversion
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH WHEELER's Petition For Preliminary Injunction And Conversion.

Wheeler's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is OFF CALENDAR. There is no proof of service and the moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of her filings in conformance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter:Giselle Casey, CSR#8098, casey.giselle@gmail.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
